title: Family Dinner Out 家庭聚餐

lines.en: Tonight we are eating out as a family.
lines.zh: 今晚我们全家出去吃饭。

lines.en: To that new Chinese restaurant near our school.
lines.zh: 去学校附近那家新开的中餐厅。

lines.en: Oh, I heard it is very good!
Your mom has already booked a table.
lines.zh: 你妈妈已经订好位子了。

lines.en: Can I order my favorite sweet and sour fish?
lines.zh: 我可以点我最喜欢的糖醋鱼吗？

lines.en: Sure. Grandma and Grandpa are coming too.
lines.zh: 当然可以。爷爷奶奶也来。

lines.en: Really? I have not seen them for a long time!
lines.zh: 真的吗？我很久没见到他们了！

lines.en: Yes. It will be a wonderful family dinner.
lines.zh: 是的。会是一顿美好的家庭聚餐。

lines.en: I cannot wait! Let me go get ready!
lines.zh: 我等不及了！我去准备一下！
